title: Fresh Silky Cocoa Uruguayan Stir-fry
description: A fresh and silky dish featuring cocoa powder in a monsoon-inspired recipe that is both Paleo-friendly and quick to prepare.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to a safe temperature for cooking under high pressure.
Slice the Paleo Chicken Breast into thin strips and lightly season them with salt and pepper. Press any excess moisture out of the Baby Carrots.
In a small bowl, mix together the Paleo-friendly Mayonnaise (if using) and a bit of water to create a dressing for your dish.
Place all ingredients in the pressure cooker: chicken, carrots, rice, avocado slices, and the mayonnaise mixture. Add enough water to cover everything.
Cook on high pressure according to your pressure cooker’s instructions for about 5 minutes, then let it naturally release steam for an additional minute or two.
Gently stir-fry over medium heat until the ingredients are heated through and the flavors meld together nicely.
